title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - CM-2
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: CM-2 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control CM-2 in the Configuration Management family. The control title for CM-2 is Baseline Configuration. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: IR-4 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, IR-4, belongs to the Incident Response family and is titled Incident Handling. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
